title: Isotrema heterophyllum
intro: Isotrema heterophyllum, also known as Himalayan isotrema or isotrema, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region, belonging to the family Apocynaceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Isotrema heterophyllum include alkaloids, glycosides, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, Isotrema heterophyllum is used to make herbal preparations such as teas, decoctions, and infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
